name: dydx-delivery
description: Stage-gated client delivery pipeline for dYdX Digital. Twelve skills (nine stage + three platform reference) covering kickoff, discovery, SOW, split functional specs (4a platform + 4b integration), technical spec, test plan, Claude-Code-ready build prompt, and sandbox test execution; Pipefy, Wrike, and Ziflow live as first-class platform skills. Cowork is the strategy seat, Claude Code is the build seat. Every stage produces a versioned, human-reviewed artefact.
